messages.content: DMT is mainly used for diagnostic purposes in the medical field. It is also used in research to help understand the effects of psychedelic drugs. It is not illegal to possess or use DMT, and there are some researchers who believe that DMT could be an effective treatment for addiction. There is currently a clinical trial in progress to test this theory
Who is the best of all women
